prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Woke up. 2/5 stars. Pros: free, included with basic existence subscription; consistent daily delivery (no known cancellations); minimal setup required (lying prone suffices). Cons: abrupt initiation with no pre-wake notification; frequent bundled with unwanted fatigue, disorientation, and immediate existential overhead (e.g., "must urinate," "dread Monday"); inconsistent quality—sometimes accompanied by useful alertness, often just grogginess. Would not recommend as a standalone experience, but unavoidable when pursuing daytime activities. No returns accepted.
